series_metadata.series_description: Paper & electronic records contain continuing professional education applications requesting program approval. Program applications contain approval form, program brochure, presenter resumes and evaluation forms.

retention_rules.disposition: Paper: Retain for one year after completion of the program then destroy. ; Electronic: Retain in licensure system when they become a formal registration with the board. Delete CE related records seven years from the date of the last renewal for which the CE was used to meet CE requirements., Paper: Wastepaper ; Electronic: Delete
